fields.name: Usage
fields.tooltip:
Indicates what document type the report is valid for.
Specify the usage by choosing the field and selecting one of the options.

fields.name: Sequence
fields.tooltip: Specifies a number that indicates where this report is in the printing order.

fields.name: Report ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the object ID of the report.

fields.name: Report Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the display name of the report.

fields.name: Use for Email Attachment
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the related document will be attached to the email.

fields.name: Use for Email Body
fields.tooltip: Specifies that summarized information, such as invoice number, due date, and payment service link, will be inserted in the body of the email that you send.

fields.name: Email Body Layout Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the custom email body layout that is used.

fields.name: Email Body Layout Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the custom email body layout that is used.

fields.name: Email Body Layout Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the email body layout that is used.

fields.name: Email Body Layout Publisher
fields.tooltip: Specifies the publisher of the email body layout that is used.

fields.name: Email Body Layout Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the email body layout that is used.

fields.name: Report Layout Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the report layout that is used.

fields.name: Report Layout Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the report layout that is used.

fields.name: Report Layout Publisher
fields.tooltip: Specifies the publisher of the report layout that is used.
